message: Jake
Yuriko
Kristy
Serial Murder Case
《ＤＥＢＵＧ!!!》
We had a falling out with Guy.
We haven't had a falling out with Guy.
Still,
what suddenly happened, I wonder?
What do you mean?
I mean, suddenly requests from the actress, talent, and film industry people we met at the party are pouring in.
Hmm.
That’s exactly what you wanted, isn't it?
Yeah, well,
that's how it is, heh.
Welcome back, Boss.

It's nice when the view is wide when he's not in front of me. It's always like this, and it makes me really happy.
What a small-town joy it is.
The downside of this angle is that it can be seen first when the door opens.
The partition in the back of the desk has become her changing room.
She is rhythmically typing on the computer she loves.
When she is at the computer, silence falls over the office. That's a good thing.
From this perspective, she looks like a very capable secretary.
It seems Anna Skakki hasn't come back yet.
Is that so?
That's a bit of a problem.
Even though the work should be busy, there's surprisingly no progress, right?
You say things that hit hard.
Because, if that's the case, it wouldn't seem like a detective even if there are requests. This is boring.
I'll start creating the Crime Library of all time and space.
When I went to Baked Apple Inc., Eva interviewed me like it was a thing.
That means the boss is famous, right? That's nice.
It's not a good thing at all. It's creepy to be investigated without even realizing it.
It's something you shouldn't worry too much about.
But does Eva intend to investigate everyone she's involved with?
I told her about receiving the request to find Cindy.
Boss!
? You can't talk about the details of requests to others! That's a basic principle of being a detective.
It was unavoidable, in the course of events.
I'm amazed.
What's done is done, but I think there are things you shouldn't say.
Something seems off.
In what way does it seem off?
They're saying things that didn't happen and laughing like it's nothing.
That makes them sound like a crazy person.
Yeah, it really seems that way.
I know a well-regarded psychoanalyst. Should I introduce you?
No, I think I'm still fine. Maybe that's just a way to cope with loneliness.
I see.
If you move carelessly, it might hurt your pride.
Sorry about that.
No, it’s just that this is all I can help with.
Looks like the bad news keeps coming.
Guy went on a trip.
Did someone call you?
No, I visited Guy's house and ran into Eva. I heard it from her.
What’s with that situation!? So Guy and Eva have a suspicious relationship.
But isn't Eva's story a bit fishy?
But it’s the truth.
Sounds shady.
Does that mean Guy and Eva are getting married?
I found out where Meryl is.
You didn’t need to know that.
What’s with that?
Because there’s nothing I can report.
Ah, I wish it were as boring as before.
Does that mean Guy and Eva are getting married?
Looks like the bad news keeps coming.
What's done is done, but I think there are things you shouldn't say.
But does Eva intend to investigate everyone she's involved with?
I guess it’s time to start creating a crime library, from past to present.
I hope to meet Anna Skakki today.
Yeah, that's right.
Let's have more hope, okay?
So, does that mean we should go report the progress to Meryl?
But there's nothing to report, is there?
So, are we just going to do nothing? You aren't maybe waiting for some contact, are you?
That’s possible to think about.
However, I have something the director asked me to do, so I really need to go.
Something the director asked for, huh?
I get that you want to talk to me, but wouldn't it be better to hurry and meet Meryl?
Mhm.
I understand that, but...
What can we do by avoiding something we don’t want to deal with?
It's best to just get the unpleasant stuff over with quickly.
Since Meryl seems difficult to deal with, I think you should be careful when interacting.
Have you heard from Meryl?
No, not at all. What will you do if we don't get any contact?
I don't think there's really a chance we won't hear back.
But if we're being teased or something, that would suck.
At least we don't have anything to report about Meryl, right?
Boss, I will really introduce you to a psychoanalyst.
No, it's fine for now. First of all,
how are we going to get there?
Can't you just say you're going to see a psychoanalyst?
If we say that,
it will hurt them.
Ah.
I'm sure they have no awareness of it, though.
Is it really okay to leave them alone?
That’s also a concern.
But in the end, we might not have a conversation without Guy, who is the root of the issue.
That's true.
This is a bit of a problem.
I,
wonder if I should visit you.
Do you think it’s alright?
There's no use worrying about it; I've already said it.
Isn't that a bit uncalled for?
It's Boss's own doing.
It's better not to think about things you can't change.
I haven't heard anything from you,
really.
It’s fine. Women are stronger than they look.
What you're saying lacks consistency.
Oh, is that so? I'm pretty forgetful, you know.
Not hearing anything might be a good sign.
Any word from Guy?
No. There was nothing. Were you expecting a message?
No, not really.
If you're worried about something, why not just go see him?
Yeah, that's true.
? Did something happen?
No, I already went to see him.
Oh, was that the case?
Guy and Boss have been friends since school, right?
Yeah, that’s right. But can I really call him a friend now?
I’m starting to lose a bit of confidence.
Boss!
You’re being quite negative.
Friendship between men is different from women’s; it’s more straightforward. No need to lament just because you haven't heard from him.
I haven't received any news from either Gloria or Director Fabar about her being found.
Where on earth did she go?
Could it be true that she stormed out after a spat with Gloria?
Just kidding, though.
But, since Cindy is a celebrity, if she's walking around, people should totally recognize her, right?
No way, could I be held captive by a pervert?
For now, I can't completely deny that possibility.
Please find me quickly and get your payment.
Did you get a call from Eva?
You mean Eva Courtney, the one who writes for BAM, right?
You don't have to explain it like that.
I mean, you're saying something that seems almost impossible. Oh, wait, did you make a date with Eva?
Why are you going in that direction?
No, not really.
W-well, that's not a bad thing.
I just don't like that Eva's investigating me. It's a real invasion of privacy.
What do you think she’s planning to do with information about the Boss?
Who knows?
I think you have something in mind, but I can't figure it out at the moment.
I hope no weird articles get written.
Please don't say anything creepy.
I'm sorry.
But if you're investigating, I think you intend to write an article.
If Eva calls, I won't respond.
I have to go see Meryl.
I haven't heard from Meryl since then.
However, considering her, it might be reasonable to think she's waiting for us to reach out.
If I can't meet Anna Skakki, finding Meryl's daughter will be tough. To be blunt, it's impossible.
Not knowing her contact info will leave me in a bind later on.
Was it because we talked about the request to find Cindy, or was it because I was worn down by the matter with Guy?
That
is the first time I've seen it.
What can I do for her?
As you said, I might need to take them to a psychoanalyst.
Maybe I should have kept the request from Gloria a secret.
But if others found out, I would have been scolded even more.
I feel bad for that.
Gai seems to be doubting the relationship between me and her.
It looked like he was being harsh on her.
But why did he think like that?
Maybe it’s best to keep that part hidden.
About the request I got from Gai, it won't make sense unless I meet him.
I wonder if he's doing alright.
Why does Eva know that Gai went on a trip? When did Gai and Eva become close?
Not even contacting her before going on a trip? About that,
he probably hasn’t told her either.
I really don’t understand what Gai has been thinking lately.
I didn't know Gai held negative feelings towards me. Is it my fault that things aren't going well for them?
Still, I never thought I'd be insulted by Gai, whom I considered a close friend.
As time passes, both environments and hearts change.
I need to meet Gai and talk to him.
Considering Cindy's absence, Gloria seemed surprisingly calm.
Gloria might have an idea of where Cindy went.
She's such an eye-catching girl; I thought she'd be easy to spot if she was walking around.
Eva might be investigating me to write some kind of article.
Gai has publicly said that it was his strength that helped me recover from drugs.
But what kind of article would he write by digging into my past?
I have to be careful with Eva.
I received a business card from a woman named Ginny, who is Tony's companion.
Is she Tony's girlfriend, or just an acquaintance?
She seemed to have some clue about Guy.
Should I try calling the number on the business card when he's not around?
What could she know about Guy?
Things have gotten weird, and Guy has disappeared somewhere.
The search for Cindy, who received a request, might suggest that she went somewhere with Guy according to Eva's article.
The other request, which is the search for Meryl's daughter, isn't progressing as I haven't been able to meet Anna Skakki, the key person.
While it might be good that my surroundings have gotten busy, it's stressful that things aren't moving along.
For now, I need to meet Meryl.
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
